title: 2 Pcs Trigger Switch Button Replacement Compatible with Dyson V7 V8 SV10 SV11 Vacuum Cleaner, Strong Power Switch Button Repair Accessories with Repair Tools Kit
features: Compatible Models: The red trigger power switch button replacement compatible with Dyson V7 V8 SV10 SV11 vacuum cleaners. This V7 trigger is the perfect replacement part to keep your vacuum running smoothly

Updated Version Replacement Trigger: This updated version power switch compatible with Dyson V8 trigger replacement, more durable than the original one, not easy to damage the key stress point and prevent the trigger switch from breaking

With High-quality Repair Tools Kit: In order to make it easier to repair your vacuum cleaner. We've included a high quality vacuum cleaner repair tools kit to provide support for replacing your vacuum cleaner's trigger button
Easy Installation Support: We provide technical support and an installation video guide to ensure a hassle-free installation process

Packing List: You will get 2 pcs V7/V8 trigger, 1 pcs philips screwdriver, 1 pcs T8 Torx screwdriver, 1 pcs spudger. If you have any questions, please feel free to tell our customer service team and we will do our best to solve your problems
description: Features: *This is the red trigger power switch button replacement compatible with Dyson V7 V8 SV10 SV11 vacuum cleaners. *Total brand new, made of high quality material, good workmanship and reliable, quality guaranteed. *This button switch almost the same as the original one, keeping your vacuum cleaner at its best working condition, perfectly match the original machine. *With High-quality Repair Tools Kit: In order to make it easier to repair your vacuum cleaner. We've included a high quality vacuum cleaner repair tools kit to provide support for replacing your vacuum cleaner's trigger button *We provide professional after-sales service, if you have any product problems, or want to consult about the maintenance of the vacuum cleaner, please feel free to contact us.
